title: pilosella schultesii
intro: Pilosella schultesii, also known as Schultes's false sowthistle or Schultes's ox-tongue, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to mountainous regions in Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pilosella schultesii include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating digestive issues and skin conditions. Pilosella schultesii is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations.
